title: rubus najas
intro: Rubus najas, also known as the Japanese bramble or Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus najas include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus najas can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
